action.reasoning: Observation: ensemble gave lower macro_f1 (0.1313) than best single model (0.1621). Simple averaging harmed performance. Analysis: weighted combination might recover complementarity. With 17 min left, we can optimize weights on val set and create weighted ensemble checkpoint. Decision: write complete predict.py supporting weighted ensembles, write optimize script to find best alpha via val macro_f1 grid search, then submit eval with weighted ensemble checkpoint.
